response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus exposure to AWS and Kubernetes — aligning well with core requirements. However, his title history (Staff/Senior) exceeds the junior/mid-level scope, and his heavy focus on DLang, embedded systems, and open-source projects may indicate misalignment with the role’s pragmatic, team-oriented energy construction tech context. German language proficiency is minimal, and on-site presence is critical.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with scalable architecture focus
Hands-on AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure relevant to cloud infrastructure
concerns: Overqualified title history (Staff/Senior) may not fit junior/mid-level role
Limited evidence of direct renewable energy or construction tech domain experience
Basic German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
